"'''The Black Sun Nexu'''" is a scenario for the [[Star Wars Miniatures]] game, written by [[Sterling Hershey]] and published on the [[Wizards of the Coast]] website on June 15, 2006. It depicts a battle between [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] and [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] forces.

==Plot summary==
The [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] syndicate, in an effort to eliminate rival smugglers, has released a [[Nexu/Legends|nexu]]. Unfortunately, the smugglers are working with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic|Rebels]], who proceed to fight back.
